summary: Completed testing of CPC Module Restructure. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - all 3 tabs working correctly: Production Planning (forecasts with new columns), Branch Capacity (branch cards with day-wise upload), Production Schedule (branch-wise per-day view). Standalone schedule creation removed - all planning now starts from forecasts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CPC Module Restructure fully tested. Key changes verified: 1) Standalone 'New Schedule' button removed - all production planning starts from forecasts via 'Plan' button. 2) Summary cards correctly show Forecast Qty, Inventory, Scheduled, Schedule Pending. 3) Schedule Pending = Forecast Qty - Inventory - Scheduled (verified in both API and UI). 4) Plan dialog requires Branch selection with capacity validation. 5) Three tabs working: Production Planning (forecasts table), Branch Capacity (branch cards with day-wise upload), Production Schedule (branch-wise per-day view with filters).

frontend_ui.CPC page loads with 3 tabs: PASS - Production Planning, Branch Capacity, Production Schedule
frontend_ui.Production Planning tab - summary cards: PASS - Total Forecasts, Forecast Qty, Inventory, Scheduled, Schedule Pending
frontend_ui.Production Planning tab - forecasts tabl: PASS - Forecast ID, Buyer, SKU, Month, Forecast Qty, Inventory, Scheduled, Pending, Status, Action
frontend_ui.Production Planning tab - Plan button: PASS - Opens dialog for scheduling from forecast
frontend_ui.Plan dialog - Branch selector required: PASS - Shows available branches for SKU with capacity info
frontend_ui.Branch Capacity tab - Branch cards: PASS - 7 branches with capacity, utilization, available
frontend_ui.Branch Capacity tab - Daily override bad: PASS - Shows when daily override is active
frontend_ui.Branch Capacity tab - 7 Day Forecast: PASS - Opens when clicking branch card
frontend_ui.Production Schedule tab - Branch-wise vi: PASS - Shows schedules grouped by branch and date
frontend_ui.Production Schedule tab - Date filters: PASS - Start Date, End Date inputs
frontend_ui.Production Schedule tab - Branch filter: PASS - Dropdown with All Branches option

cpc_restructure_verification.schedule_pending_formula_correct: Schedule Pending = Forecast Qty - Inventory - Scheduled
